inputs.label: Angle in Radians
inputs.businessContext: The angle measurement in radians to be converted.

businessContext_i18n.en: The angle measurement in radians to be converted.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure de l'angle en radians à convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: La medida del ángulo en radianes a convertir.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Gradians per radian. Standard is 200/π. Adjust for custom units.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gradians per radian. Standard is 200/π. Adjust for custom units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Radyan başına gradyan. Standart 200/π'dir. Özel birimler için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gradianten pro Radiant. Standard ist 200/π. Für benutzerdefinierte Einheiten anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Gradians par radian. La valeur standard est 200/π. Ajustez pour des unités personnalisées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gradianes por radián. El estándar es 200/π. Ajustar para unidades personalizadas.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida.

inputs.label: Calibration Offset
inputs.businessContext: Additive offset in gradians for calibration purposes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additive offset in gradians for calibration purposes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalibrasyon amacıyla gradyan cinsinden eklenen ofset.
businessContext_i18n.de: Additiver Offset in Gradianten für Kalibrierungszwecke.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage additif en gradians à des fins de calibration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento aditivo en gradianes para fines de calibración.

breakdown: Multiply radians by conversion factor: angleRadians * conversionFactor
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
